body_txt: Two (or more) characters have entirely different ideas on how they are perceived by each other. Can lead to Cringe Comedy when the truth gets out or could alternatively be Played for Drama . Likely outcomes include Break the Haughty / Break the Cutie , Did You Actually Believe...? , "The Reason You Suck" Speech and Was It All a Lie? .  Compare Master of Delusion , Psychological Projection , and Small Name, Big Ego .
